intro: Snowflake and Databricks are moving up the AI stack as companies build personal productivity agents, following a pattern similar to the personal computer era's evolution. The US is tightening restrictions on Nvidia AI chip shipments to Chinese firms, targeting subsidiaries operating outside China through intermediaries. SoftBank plans to invest up to €75 billion in French AI data centers, aiming to establish 5 gigawatts of capacity and position Europe as a major AI infrastructure hub.
